scripts.lint: eslint src tests scripts vitest.config.ts next.config.ts eslint.config.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run clean:validation && tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json --noEmit --incremental false
scripts.typecheck:full: npm run clean:validation && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --incremental false
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.validate:local: npm run validate && npm run smoke:staging
scripts.validate:staging: npm run validate && SMOKE_STRICT=true npm run smoke:staging
